creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 232864
v1

Moin moin 

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade print/freetype2 to 2.12.0.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-print-freetype2-update-to-2.12.0.patch


mfg Tobias
